name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine peanut butter and margarine.
Add crisped rice cereal and sugar, mixing until evenly combined.
2. Portion the cereal mixture using a rounded measuring teaspoon.
Roll into balls and set aside.
3. In the top of a double boiler over hot water, melt chocolate coating
and shortening. Dip each peanut butter ball in the coating,
placing on waxed paper-lined baking sheet.
4. Drizzle with melted white coating if desired.
5. Refrigerate until firm. Place in small candy paper cups to serve.
Per serving (1 ball): 90 calories
